module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for session runtime orchestration, model backend abstractions, and the implemented task execution runtime. lib.rs is re-export wiring and now re-exports SessionContext beside Session and SessionState; the session child module owns Session, SessionState, SessionContext, and route_session_event handling that ignores standalone Step events safely, the model child module owns backend contracts, and the task child module owns Task, TaskState, and Step.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. ModelRequest carries the model-facing task Step and derives only Debug/Clone now that Step is no longer Eq. ModelBackendImpl exposes only send, bridged to ModelBackend by a blanket impl; DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests, and ModelBackendError converts io, serde_json, and reqwest errors.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, SessionState storage, SessionContext, and standalone Step-event routing that is safely ignored because StepEvent has no task identity.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the implemented task runtime. task.rs defines Task and private model-step/status emission behavior, now emitting TaskStatus::Succeed(TaskResult) on success; task_state.rs owns plain TaskState storage; step.rs defines Step; mod.rs is namespace and re-export wiring only.
